tracks.meaning: a ridge of rock, sand, or coral at or near the surface of the sea that is a hazard to ships
a ridge or chain of rocks or coral in the ocean, typically supporting marine ecosystems
a ridge of hard rock or mineral formation at or near the surface of water
to fold, roll up, or reduce something to a smaller size (as in 'reef the sails')
a ridge or projection on a surface, particularly a roof, that provides structural support or water drainage
